## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number), or reference the related issue(s).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## How tested

Describe how you verified the change. The app must be built and exercised
on Windows (capture, annotate, upload flow) before submitting.

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds successfully with `npm run tauri build`
- [ ] `svelte-check` passes with no new errors
- [ ] No personal data or secrets included in the changes
- [ ] Code comments are written in English
